# init(id:partData:)

**Initializer**

Construct an instance of this object with the parts data passed in.

## Declaration

```swift
init(id: AssignableDocument.ID, partData: [AssignableDocument.PartID : MergeablePartData]) async throws
```

## Parameters

- **id**: The ID of this document.
- **partData**: A dictionary of part IDs to [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/MergeablePartData] objects that contain the parts data.

## Creating an assignable document

- **init(pdfURL:id:)**: Initializes a new assessment document that is based on the PDF located at the provided URL. If the file located at the URL provided cannot be accessed, this initializer throws.
- **MergeablePartData**
- **init(id:partData:)**: Construct an instance of this object with the parts data passed in.
- **init(pdfURL:authors:id:)**: Initializes a new assessment document that is based on the PDF located at the provided URL. If the file located at the URL provided cannot be accessed, this initializer throws.
